title: Feng Zhu

'''Feng Zhu''' drew the ''[[Imperial Recruitment]]'' comic for ''[[Star Wars: Visionaries]]''. He also worked on [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].
